allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role'', ''''\) content = obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\): if block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[{role}] TEXT:'', block[''text''][:400]\) elif block.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_use'': print\(f''[{role}] TOOL_USE:'', block[''name''], str\(block.get\(''input'', {}\)\)[:300]\) except Exception as e: pass ")
